---
title: "Set up vignettes for download from GitHub"
author: "John Maindonald"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GITready}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The main purpose of this "vignette" is to remind the maintainer of the steps
needed when a vignette is changed or added.  Run as a minimum the first 
and last lines of the following code before committing to GitHub.

```{r exampleCode, eval=F}
tools::buildVignettes(dir = ".", tangle=TRUE)
dir.create("inst")
dir.create("inst/doc")
file.copy(dir("vignettes", full.names=TRUE), "inst/doc", overwrite=TRUE)
```
